finding.title: Session fixation via insecure cookie handling
finding.description: The application allows session IDs to be reused across authentication boundaries, enabling an attacker to fix a victim's session.
finding.impact: An attacker can hijack authenticated sessions, gaining full access to victim accounts.
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to the login page as an unauthenticated user.
Observe the session cookie assigned prior to authentication.
Notice that the session cookie value remains unchanged after login.
Reuse the same session cookie in a separate browser to hijack the session.
finding.expected_result: Session identifiers should be regenerated upon successful authentication.
finding.actual_result: Session identifiers remain the same across authentication, allowing fixation.

evidence.description: Packet capture showing unchanged session ID across login.
